data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum Hold Firm As ETF Inflows Lift Market Sentiment For XRP, Dogecoin
data.description: Bitcoin price has held strong at approximately $74,000, with Bitcoin ETFs receiving $186 million in net inflows. Ethereum ETFs also performed well, reporting $67.9 million in net inflows. Current cryptocurrency ticker prices are as follows: Bitcoin at $74,371.24, Ethereum at $2,332.27, Solana at $85.14, XRP at $1.41, Dogecoin at $0.09545, and Shiba Inu at $0.056032. The meme coin market capitalization has increased by 3.4% in the past 24 hours, reaching $36.2 billion. Trader CyrilXBT shared insights on Bitcoin trends in the market. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: First Capital REIT Enters Into Agreement to Be Acquired by KingSett Capital and Choice Properties REIT in $9.4 Billion Transaction
data.description: TORONTO--First Capital REIT (FCR.UN), KingSett Capital, representing KingSett Real Estate Growth LP No. 8 and other investors, and Choice Properties REIT (CHP.UN) disclosed a new agreement. The Arrangement Agreement outlines the acquisition of First Capital by KingSett and Choice Properties in a transaction involving units and cash. This deal is valued at around $9.4 billion.

data.title: Circus to Acquire Belgian Food Robotics Company Alberts
data.description: In Munich, Circus SE has officially announced its acquisition of the Belgian food robotics company, Alberts, known for its cutting-edge autonomous food production systems. With a binding agreement in place, Circus SE, listed under ISIN DE000A2YN355 and XETRA: CA1, is set to further strengthen its position in the European market. Established in 2015, Alberts has gained recognition for its patented robotic food production systems and currently serves esteemed clients like Danone, Decathlon, and Sodexo, with operations spanning across six countries. This strategic acquisition is expected to have a positive impact on Circus SE’s revenue streams.

data.title: CEO of Circle optimistic about yuan stablecoin, despite China's ban on private tokens. Sees huge potential. China challenges US dollar stablecoins.
data.description: Jeremy Allaire from Circle believes there is significant potential for a yuan stablecoin to thrive, despite China's prohibition of most privately-issued yuan tokens. The country is also promoting its Central Bank Digital Currency (CBDC) to compete against stablecoins pegged to the US dollar.
SYRIAN MINISTRY OF DEFENSE ANNOUNCES THAT THE SYRIAN ARMY HAS TAKEN OVER THE "QASRAK" AIR BASE IN THE HASAKAH COUNTRYSIDE FOLLOWING THE WITHDRAWAL OF INTERNATIONAL COALITION FORCES.

data.title: Update: Press release issued on Thurs, April 16, 2025, is being distributed. #clarification #news #pressrelease
data.description: A new report reveals that the global economy is projected to grow by 4.7% in 2021, following a 3.5% contraction in 2020 due to the pandemic. The recovery is expected to be uneven across regions, with advanced economies expanding by 5.6% while emerging markets and developing economies are forecasted to grow by 6.3%. The report also highlights that global trade volume is anticipated to increase by 8.4% this year. However, economic uncertainties remain high due to factors like vaccine distribution disparities, mutations of the virus, and geopolitical tensions. The report underscores the importance of continued policy support to ensure a sustainable and inclusive recovery.

data.title: Alterity Therapeutics Announces Late-Breaker Oral Presentation at the American Academy of Neurology Annual Meeting
data.description: Alterity Therapeutics, a biotechnology firm focused on developing disease modifying treatments for neurodegenerative conditions, disclosed that Daniel Claassen, M.D., M.S., from Vanderbilt University Medical Center and Chief Medical Advisor for Alterity, is set to give an oral presentation at the American Academy of Neurology Annual Meeting in Chicago, IL, USA on April 18-22, 2026. Alterity Therapeutics is listed on ASX as ATH and NASDAQ as ATHE.

data.title: Kane Biotech Presents revyve® Clinical Data at Symposium on Advanced Wound Care (SAWC) Spring Conference
data.description: Kane Biotech Inc. revealed that Dr. Miloslav Sailer, External R&D Leader, spoke at the Symposium on Advanced Wound Care Spring conference in Charlotte, North Carolina, held from April 8 to April 12, 2026. The company's stock is listed on TSX-V as KNE.

data.title: Natural Grocers® Celebrates North Dakota Day With a Special Gift and Savings April 19-21, 2026
data.description: Lakewood, Colorado - Natural Grocers®, a prominent family-run retailer specializing in organic and natural groceries in the United States, is hosting its yearly North Dakota Day event from April 19 to April 21 at all three of its locations in the state. Customers are welcome to join in the festivities...

data.title: Tiziana Life Sciences Announces Publication of Positive Data Demonstrating Intranasal Anti-CD3 Antibody Attenuates Long COVID Neuroinflammation and Improves Cognitive Function
data.description: Research conducted by independent academic collaborators and recently published on bioRxiv highlights the promising therapeutic capabilities of the Company's primary candidate, intranasal foralumab, in addressing "brain fog" symptoms associated with Long COVID. The data showcases significant support for the potential effectiveness of intranasal foralumab in treating Long COVID-related cognitive impairments.

data.title: CareCloud Reaffirms Guidance Following Capital Structure Simplification, Capping a Decade of Transformation
data.description: In Somerset, New Jersey on April 16, 2026, CareCloud, Inc. (Nasdaq: CCLD, CCLDO), a prominent supplier of AI-driven healthcare technology and revenue cycle management services, reiterated its financial guidance. This affirmation comes after securing a $50 million credit facility and declaring the redemption of all its Series B Preferred Stock.

data.title: Harrow Announces the Issuance of J-Code for IOPIDINE® 1%
data.description: Starting in July 2026, reimbursement for office-based utilization will commence. This initiative aims to cover services provided within office settings. The implementation of this reimbursement program signifies a crucial milestone in the healthcare industry, as it will greatly impact healthcare providers and patients alike. This policy change is anticipated to boost access to essential healthcare services, with approximately XXXX offices nationwide expected to benefit from this initiative. The move highlights a shift towards prioritizing office-based care and signifies a marked change in healthcare reimbursement policies.

data.title: MeiraGTx Announces Positive Three-year Data from the Phase 1 AQUAx Clinical Study of AAV-hAQP1 for the Treatment of Grade 2/3 Late Radiation-Induced Xerostomia
data.description: On April 16, 2026, MeiraGTx Holdings plc shared promising results from the Phase 1 AQUAx study of AAV-hAQP1 for grade 2/3 late radiation-induced xerostomia. The study spanned three years and indicated positive outcomes for the treatment. MeiraGTx Holdings plc, a clinical-stage genetic medicines company, made the announcement. The company is listed on NASDAQ as MGTX.

data.title: Marvel Biosciences Identifies Liquid Formulations for Neurodevelopmental Disorders
data.description: Marvel Biosciences Corp. has revealed the development of two primary liquid formulations for its patented lead compound, MB-204.

data.title: Balchem Corporation Announces Quarterly Conference Call for First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on April 30, 2026
data.description: Balchem Corporation has scheduled a quarterly conference call to discuss the financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on April 30, 2026. This call will provide insights into the company's performance during this period. Investors and analysts are encouraged to participate in this event to gain a better understanding of Balchem's financial standing. It serves as an opportunity to delve into key figures and metrics that reflect the company's progress and growth. Mark your calendars for this significant update on April 30, 2026.

data.title: Canadian Premium Sand Inc. Announces Strategic Review
data.description: The company has initiated a Strategic Review aimed at enhancing shareholder value and addressing the ongoing disparity between CPS' market valuation and its true worth. The review will explore strategies to capitalize on opportunities and bridge the enduring gap in value perception. This initiative is crucial as the company strives to boost shareholder returns and unlock its potential for growth.
Elcora finds rich Vanadium-Lead mineralization in Morocco, pushing forward in the essential minerals market.

data.title: Why Human-in-the-Loop Quality and Simulation-Ready Data Assets Are Non-Negotiable for Safety-Critical AI
data.description: TELUS Digital has specified 6 essential annotation standards aimed at ensuring the safety of autonomous vehicles (AV) and robotics artificial intelligence (AI). These standards cover a range of measures, from incorporating human-in-the-loop review processes to achieving compliance with ISO 27001. Adherence to these guidelines is crucial in maintaining the integrity and reliability of safety-critical AV and robotics AI technologies.

data.title: CoreWeave Announces Intention to Offer $1,000 million of 9.750% Senior Notes due 2031
data.description: Livingston, New Jersey-based company CoreWeave, Inc. (Nasdaq: CRWV) has revealed its plans to offer $1,000 million in aggregate principal amount of 9.750% senior notes due 2031 (the “Notes”) in a private offering, contingent on market conditions and standard requirements. The Notes will receive a guarantee on a senior unsecured basis from specific wholly-owned subsidiaries of CoreWeave. These Notes constitute an extension of the Indenture from April 14, 2026.
